package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for route_param_name_and_dto_field_name_drift_without_mapping_helper: Repeated manual renaming between route params and DTO fields that lacks a shared mapper.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule150NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule150NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule150NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario150Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule150NegativeService, input Rule150NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
